inputs.label: Population Size
inputs.businessContext: The total number of individuals in the population.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total number of individuals in the population.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Personen in der Grundgesamtheit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre total d'individus dans la population.

inputs.label: Expected Proportion
inputs.businessContext: The estimated proportion of the population possessing the attribute of interest. If unsure, use 0.5 for maximum variability.

businessContext_i18n.en: The estimated proportion of the population possessing the attribute of interest. If unsure, use 0.5 for maximum variability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlgilenilen özelliğe sahip popülasyonun tahmini oranı. Emin değilseniz maksimum değişkenlik için 0,5 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der geschätzte Anteil der Grundgesamtheit, der das interessierende Merkmal besitzt. Bei Unsicherheit 0,5 für maximale Variabilität verwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La proportion estimée de la population possédant l'attribut d'intérêt. En cas de doute, utilisez 0,5 pour une variabilité maximale.

inputs.label: Margin of Error
inputs.businessContext: The maximum acceptable difference between the sample estimate and the true population value.

businessContext_i18n.en: The maximum acceptable difference between the sample estimate and the true population value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Örneklem tahmini ile gerçek popülasyon değeri arasındaki kabul edilebilir maksimum fark.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal akzeptable Differenz zwischen Stichprobenschätzung und wahrem Populationswert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La différence maximale acceptable entre l'estimation de l'échantillon et la valeur réelle de la population.

inputs.label: Z-score
inputs.businessContext: The Z-value corresponding to the desired confidence level (e.g., 1.96 for 95% confidence).

businessContext_i18n.en: The Z-value corresponding to the desired confidence level (e.g., 1.96 for 95% confidence).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen güven düzeyine karşılık gelen Z-değeri (ör. %95 güven için 1,96).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Z-Wert, der dem gewünschten Konfidenzniveau entspricht (z. B. 1,96 für 95% Konfidenz).
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur Z correspondant au niveau de confiance souhaité (par exemple, 1,96 pour un intervalle de confiance de 95 %).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
